problem: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed?
mechanism: Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations
hypothesis: If Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations is applied to it, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 23 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
